description.pt1: Specialized in React, Next.js; modern backend systems.
description.pt2: Building scalable architecture with high-performance execution.

description.pt1: I am a software engineer focused on building robust fullstack applications. My journey involves deep-diving into complex architectural problems and delivering clean, maintainable code that drives business value.
description.pt2: Beyond coding, I focus on system performance, developer experience, and creating seamless user interfaces that feel intuitive and powerful.

01.title: NexusCRM
01.description: High-frequency trading interface for cryptocurrency assets with real-time WebSocket updates and custom charting libraries for institutional investors.

02.title: Speaker Trainer for Business
02.description: High-throughput indexing engine for EVM-compatible networks, capable of processing blocks concurrently with zero data loss.

profissionalExperience.description: Leading the development of core banking features. Optimised server-side rendering for a 48% improvement in LCP and integrated multi-region PostgreSQL clusters for high availability.
bullets: Mentoring 3 junior developers on modern architecture practices.
Architecture design for real-time payment processor engine.

profissionalExperience.description: Developed custom SaaS platforms for enterprise clients across healthcare and logistics industries. Focused on creating scalable UI components and efficient API layer integrations.
bullets: Reduced deployment cycles by 60% through automated pipeline implementations.
Successfully migrated legacy PHP apps to React/Next.js stacks.
